summary: Full end-to-end verification of the JWT auth + private-dashboard iteration on AccessVerse. Backend: 15/15 pytest tests pass (health, auth login/me happy+sad paths, public POST /api/quotes and /api/consultations require NO auth, protected GET /api/quotes and GET /api/consultations return 401 without a Bearer token and 200 with a valid token, PATCH status routes 401 without token / 200 with token and value persists). Frontend: (1) public homepage nav no longer contains a 'Compliance Tracker' tab, (2) 'Get Free Quote' modal submits successfully and success screen does NOT render the visitor's email, (3) 'Book Consultation' modal submits successfully and success screen does NOT render the visitor's email (only date/time), (4) private route /compliance-tracker-admin-7fq3x9 renders the Admin Access login gate, wrong credentials show 'Invalid username or password' and do NOT grant access, correct credentials (admin/aezakmiAEZAKMI12) load the Compliance Dashboard, the native <select> status change (Pending -> In Remediation) PATCHes and persists, and the Log Out button clears localStorage token and returns to the login screen.
action_items: Optional: Add a data-testid to the native <select> in Dashboard.jsx (e.g. `quote-status-select-{id}`) so status changes are deterministic to automate; today we identify it positionally via document.querySelectorAll('select').
Optional (code quality): consultation POST still awaits send_notification_email; quote POST correctly uses asyncio.create_task. Consider aligning to avoid latency on slow Resend responses.
Optional: JWT_SECRET is currently a static value in backend/.env; rotate on deploy and consider adding brute-force lockout on /api/auth/login (currently unlimited attempts).
critical_code_review_comments: server.py: send_notification_email is `await`ed for consultations (line 419) but `asyncio.create_task` for quotes (line 304). Inconsistent — align both to non-blocking for the stated 'must not block form success' requirement.

server.py get_current_admin does a DB lookup on every protected request (db.admins.find_one). Fine for single-admin, but if this grows to many admins it should be cached / removed unless revocation is needed.
server.py: ADMIN_PASSWORD is read from env and only seeded on startup; if it changes at runtime you must restart. seed_admin correctly updates hash when password changes on next startup — verified.
Dashboard.jsx: axios calls send Bearer header from localStorage but the client-side JWT expiry is not decoded; only 401 responses trigger auto-logout. That is acceptable and works, verified via UI.
Home.jsx line 34 comment still mentions 'dashboard' state even though the nav tab is removed — dead comment.
updated_files: /app/backend/tests/backend_test.py (rewritten with 15 tests covering auth + public + protected + PATCH lifecycles)
seed_data_creation: Backend pytest created quotes/consultations prefixed TEST_Patch_, TEST_Public_ and UI runs created 'UI Test User Auth' quote and 'Consult Auth Tester' consultation. All persisted in MongoDB (quote_requests, consultations).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Dashboard is at /compliance-tracker-admin-7fq3x9 behind a login gate; token stored in localStorage['av_admin_token']. Status <select> has no data-testid — locate positionally via `document.querySelectorAll('select')`. Public POST endpoints remain OPEN; all GET/PATCH require Authorization: Bearer <jwt> (HS256, 8h expiry). Login endpoint has no rate-limit/lockout.
rca of the issue: No new bug found. Previous PATCH Body() fix from iteration 1 is stable. All acceptance criteria from the review request are met: (a) success screens no longer show visitor email — verified in QuoteFormModal.jsx and ConsultationModal.jsx success blocks; (b) nav tab 'Compliance Tracker' removed from Home.jsx — verified via nav.innerText scan; (c) auth gate enforced — verified via curl-equivalent pytest and Playwright UI; (d) wrong password rejected with visible error and no access granted.
